pairing_notes: Apply before moisturizer; follow with SPF if used in the morning.

what_it_is.headline: Prep or toner step
what_it_is.body: Brighten and smooth your skin with Pixi Vitamin-C Tonic. This daily toner helps even tone, exfoliate and hydrate for a healthy, radiant glow.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Multi-concern coverage
why_it_stands_out.body: Covers brightness and smoother texture in one product step.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Formula angle
why_it_stands_out.body: Brighten and smooth your skin with Pixi Vitamin-C Tonic.

watchouts.label: May be too active for very sensitive or over-exfoliated skin.
